titleStmt.title: SII 30.103: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 103. (A.R. No. 180 of 1915.) Tirumukkūḍal, Madhurantakam Taluk, Chingleput District Veṅkaṭēsa Perumāḷ temple-on the south wall of the first prakāra Vikrama-Chōḻa: year 3: 1121 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription is incomplete. It begins with the praśasti of Vikramachōḻa ‘pūmādu’ etc. It records the sale of land by the ūrār of Pālaiyūr alias Rājēndrasōḻanallūr in Pālaiyūr-nāḍu, in Ūṟṟukkāṭṭu-kōṭṭam a sub division of Jayaṅgoṇḍasōḻa-maṇḍalam after receiving money from the treasury of the temple. It is also stated that the land was declared as iṟaiyili dēvadāna. The land was sold to the temple of Tiruviṇṇagara-Āḻvār at Tiruviṇṇagar in Aṟṟūr-nāḍu for conducting various rituals and services at the above temple.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu vaḷara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu virumpa tanniru patamalar mannavar cūṭa manniya vurimaiyāl maṇimuṭi cūṭicce
ṅkol ninṟu ticaitoṟum vaḷappa veṅkali nīṅki meyyaṟan=taḻaippa kaliṅkamiriyak kaṭamalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiyāḻi naṭātti Irucuṭaraḷavum Oru
kuṭai niḻaṟṟa virasimhāsanattu mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum viṟṟirun=taruḷiya kopparakecarivanmarāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikkiramacoḻa tevaṟku yāṇṭu 3 Ā
vatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu Ūṟṟukāṭṭuk koṭṭattu pālaiyūr nāṭṭup pālaiyūrāna rājentracoḻanallūr Ūrkku camainta koṟṟamān Āṭavalān
kunṟeṟaṉum tiruppālaiyūrkiḻavan tirunārāyaṇaṉun=tiruppanaṅkāṭuṭaiyānum tiruppālaiyūrkiḻān coṟtuṇai Aḻakiyānum tiruppālaiyūr kiḻavan veḷānāṉa
tevanum veḷḷiaṇitāṅki vikkiramakecariyu māttuḻān nan=ti kuṭitāṅki yum kunṟattuḻān mañcan centāmaraikkaṇṇanum kunṟattuḻān mañcan maṇṭakavanum mañ
can peru kkanum Iḷaiyātan veṭṭan Ēṟu cevaka tiruveṇ kāṭuṭaiyānum nāḻāna ceppi Amaṉimayamayānum kiṭaṅkan veḷḷi mātavanum Aru
npākkiḻān=tirupperi mātavanum cāttuvāy vāmanan kovīṟṟu Ēṟu kuṭaiyān naḷḷāṟan ponnāṭaic celvanumuḷḷiṭṭa Ūrom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻu
ttu Ikkoṭṭattu Āṟṟūr nāṭṭut tiruviṇṇakaril tiruviṇṇaka rāḻvārkkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum niman=taṅkaḷukku tirumaṭaippa
ḷḷippuṟamāka Ivvāḻvār śrīpaṇṭārattil nāṅkaḷ vilai koṇṭu Iṟaiyili tevatānamāka viṟṟukkuṭutta pūmiyāvatu Eṅkaḷur Ēri
Etirvāyil Ūrppotuvāyt tarampeṟṟun=taram peṟātum kāṭuṅ kaḷaru muṭaiyu muṭaippumāka kallu maṇalumāyk kiṭan=ta nilam kiḻpā
ṟkellai kaḷarikku Iṟaikkuṅ kārāmpittulaikkum Ērikku nirpāyum Ōṭaikkālukku meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ivvoṭaikkaḷu
kku vaṭakkum Itan teṟke kāraḷappān kuḻiyāy vaṇṇānolikkuṅ kuḻikke Uṟṟu Ikkuḻiyin melkaraiye tenmeṟkku nokkip po
y Ellaikkallāka naṭṭa kaṟkaḷukku meṟku vāykkālleyuṟavum tenpāṟkellai Ivvāykkālukku vaṭakkum Ikkālaiyūṭaṟut
tu nakariyeṟappona peruvaḻiyileyuṟṟu meṟku nokkippona peruvaḻikku vaṭakkum Eṅkaḷur Ērikku nīr pāyumoṭaikkā
lileyuṟṟu Itaṟku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Ivvāykkālukkum māttuḻānan=tikuṭitāṅki kāṇiyāna nan=tiperumān ceṟuvin
kiḻvarampukkuṅ kāraṭi naṅkaiyāna ceṟuvin kiḻvarampukkum Itan vaṭakkiṟ putuppulattin kiḻvarampukku kiḻakkuuṟṟuk kiḻakku
nokki vaṭapāṟkellai Ūrkkiḻān kāṇiyāy māttuḻānan=ti kuṭitāṅki Anupavikkiṟa mūṅkiṟkuṇṭilin tenvarampukku teṟkum IñceRead- iṅkeme
lpāṟkellai kāñcippaḷḷaṅkaḷin kiḻvarampukku kiḻakku muṅkai viḷākattin teṟkiṟkuṇṭileyuṟavum Iṅke vaṭapāṟkellai muṅkai
viḷākattin kiḻvarampe piṭittu muṅkilān Ēriye kiḻakku nokkip poy maṇalmeṭṭileyuṟa Itukku teṟkum maṇal meṭṭil melācaṟuti Iṅku ni
nṟapuṟṟukku meṟke piṭittu kāñcippaḷḷaṅkaḷile Uṟa Itukkuk kiḻakkum Innam kāñcippaḷḷaṅkaḷin kiḻvarampukkuk kiḻakkum Innam kāñcippaḷḷa
ṅkaḷin varampe piṭittu kiḻakku pona peruvaḻiyile Uṟa Itukkut teṟkum Iṅke melpāṟkellai maṇal meṭṭil ki(ḻ)ḻācaṟu
ti vaṭakku nokkip periyeriyuḷḷe veppañ ceriyeyp pona vaḻikku Uṟa Itukkukkiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Eriyuḷḷe vempac ceri yeṟippona
vaḻikkut teṟkum Āka
Digital edition of SII 30.103 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
